_comment: #463: the route-namespace contract between the two deployed services. Incident: llm-service's Traefik `/api` rule shadowed app-web's /api/auth/* and login broke on staging AND production — no artifact in this repo could turn red when either service grew a conflicting route. Each service declares the URL prefixes it owns on the shared domain; tools/check_route_manifest.py (ci-web + ci-python) fails when a route lands outside its service's prefixes or when two services' prefixes overlap. infra2's Traefik rules must map exactly these prefixes — link this file from the infra2 change that fixes #463.
